heading: Insurance of office funds of Secretary of Senate and Sergeant at Arms; payment of premiums
label: 6507 Insurance of office funds of Secretary of Senate and Sergeant at Arms; payment of premiums
text: The Secretary of the Senate and the Sergeant at Arms on and after , are authorized and directed to protect the funds of their respective offices by purchasing insurance in an amount necessary to protect said funds against loss. Premiums on such insurance shall be paid out of the contingent fund of the Senate, upon vouchers approved by the chairman of the Committee on Rules and Administration.June 27, 1956
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 65a of this titleSection is from the Legislative Branch Appropriation Act, 1957, act .June 27, 1956
